meaning: n.(船,飞机,导弹等的)后体,尾部
examples: The drag increasing of the larger-upswept afterbody is due to the afterbody separation.
This paper states a new vibration reduction system of afterbody vibration, called as damp tank.
The key problem in the hull form design for a high speed round bilge displacement craft is to select an appropriate afterbody form.
